articles.title: Maryland allows new chicken house construction to resume after permitting delay
articles.description: For more than nine months, Maryland poultry farmers haven't been able to build any new chicken houses because the state had not issued a pollution permit setting environmental requirements for animal feeding operations.

articles.description: A Towson University alumna who was shot at an on-campus party in 2021 cannot sue the university for failing to protect her in the incident, after the Maryland Supreme Court dismissed her case this week.
